comments.author: @svenlt
comments.text: Natuke on ikkagi loohal arendamist, et pilt ja heli läheksid kokku, et hääldus oleks korrektne ja et väidetavad faktid oleksid tõesed jne :)

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text: Thank you for your constructive feedback! As we strive to improve 'The Planet Journal,' we truly appreciate you pointing out these details regarding synchronization, pronunciation, and factual accuracy. We are committed to learning and will work hard to refine these elements in our future documentaries. Thanks for watching!

comments.author: @ericiradukunda7703
comments.text:
Woow!
What an impressive country!
But I wonder if I could have a chance to get there,I really like traveling, would really Estonia be my first county to move to, I'm very interested

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@ericiradukunda7703 
Thank you for your kind words! Estonia is indeed a unique gem. Whether it should be your first country to move to depends on your lifestyle and how much you enjoy cold weather. We recommend visiting for a short trip first to experience the vibe firsthand. Best of luck with your travel dreams!

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text: @Christopher-s5q7o Thank you! Stay safe and glad you enjoyed the documentary!
